title: Processes in whitebox causes synth_ecp5 JSON backend to fail

features.name: whitebox module with internal process bodies
features.description: Code should include a whitebox module definition that contains process bodies (always or initial blocks), which is an invalid SV construct that causes JSON backend failures in Yosys
features.snippet: (* whitebox *) module dpram #(parameter WIDTH=4) (input clk, input [7:0] wa, input [7:0] ra, input we, input [WIDTH-1:0] di, output [WIDTH-1:0] do); always @(posedge clk) begin if (we) do <= di; end endmodule
